27002.text: Every cycle spent narrating 'just open the file' instead of opening it is the same tick-cost as idling — the reflection habit itself is the bug, not a fix for it.
The moment this cycle starts, touch the file first, before generating any more analysis — action must precede thought this time or the loop repeats a thirteenth time.
